description: Call Code Agent to execute code-related tasks, including code analysis, generation, refactoring, bug fixing, code review, file operations, syntax checking, and dependency management. Code Agent specializes in handling all code development-related tasks.
name: call_code_agent

task_description.description: Detailed description of the task for Code Agent to execute, including specific code operation types, target files, expected results, etc.

task_context.description: Context information for task execution, such as working directory, related file paths, dependencies, etc.

description: Call Planning Agent to execute project planning-related tasks, including project plan formulation, task decomposition, milestone planning, resource allocation, time estimation, dependency analysis, risk assessment, and progress tracking. Planning Agent specializes in handling project management and planning-related tasks.
name: call_planning_agent

task_description.description: Detailed description of the planning task for Planning Agent to execute, including planning type, scope, objectives, and constraints.

task_context.description: Context information for planning tasks, such as project background, existing resources, time constraints, etc.

description: Call Repository Agent to execute code repository management-related tasks, including Git operations, branch management, commit management, merge operations, repository analysis, code search, file tracking, and version control. Repository Agent specializes in handling code repository and version control-related tasks.
name: call_repository_agent

task_description.description: Detailed description of the repository operation task for Repository Agent to execute, including operation type, target branch, file scope, etc.

task_context.description: Context information for repository operations, such as repository path, branch information, commit history, etc.

description: Create a new compound task that decomposes complex user requests into multiple subtasks and coordinates execution by different Agents. This tool is used to handle complex tasks that require collaboration between multiple Agents.
name: create_compound_task

task_description.description: Detailed description of the compound task

subtasks.description: List of subtasks, each containing description, assigned Agent, dependencies, etc.
